Direct Questions: You are at a conference with your peers, which of the following activities are you most likely doing?
Communication (Influencer Cook 📢): Live-posting highlights, writing threads, and making sure your followers don't miss a thing
Engagement (Community Cook 🤝): Playing matchmaker in the hallways — connecting people who absolutely need to know each other
Strategic (Head Chef 🧠): Quietly scoping trends, spotting white spaces, and mentally drafting the next big strategy
Accountability (Hostess with the Mostest: Making sure everyone has the agenda, the Wi-Fi code, and knows where the good coffee is
Technical (Nerd Cook 💻): Hunting down the speaker who mentioned reproducible workflows so you can geek out together
Cooking Curious (Active contributor ❤️): Chatting with people, sharing your experiences, and trying to find ways to contribute to the community
Participant (Not sure where to get star: Sipping conference coffee and taking selfie to post it with the event hashtag

Direct Questions: You are at a meeting that feels disorganized, what role do you naturally assume?
Communication (Influencer Cook 📢): You draft a crisp summary of what's been said so everyone's aligned on the same page
Engagement (Community Cook 🤝): You check in with quieter voices in the room to make sure everyone gets heard
Strategic (Head Chef 🧠): You gently redirect the group toward goals and what actually matters long-term
Accountability (Hostess with the Mostest: You volunteer to capture action items and chase people up afterwards (cheerfully)
Technical (Nerd Cook 💻): You start sketching a workflow diagram on a napkin to untangle the confusion
Cooking Curious (Active contributor ❤️): You ask questions and share your perspective, trying to find a way to contribute to the solution
Participant (Not sure where to get star: Sit back, relax and watch the chaos unfold, hoping someone will step in

Direct Questions: Someone proposes a new project at your workplace, you are more likely to suggest...
Communication (Influencer Cook 📢): We need a comms plan! Let's think about the narrative and how we announce this to the world.
Engagement (Community Cook 🤝): Who are our stakeholders? Let's build an onboarding plan and get the community involved from day one.
Strategic (Head Chef 🧠): What's the strategic fit? Let me do a quick horizon scan before we commit to anything.
Accountability (Hostess with the Mostest: Let's set up a timeline, a risk register, and define who owns what before we start.
Technical (Nerd Cook 💻): Have we decided on the license, version control, and whether this will be open source?
Cooking Curious (Active contributor ❤️): How can I help? What are the next steps and how can I get involved?
Participant (Not sure where to get star: Can I help? Who else is involved and how can I get on board?

Direct Questions: You are in a Hackathon refreshment break. Someone says that they are contributing to project "Foo"? What is your first comment?
Communication (Influencer Cook 📢): I've seen your posts about it! Have you thought about a newsletter or blog series?
Engagement (Community Cook 🤝): Amazing! Who else is involved? How can other people get on board?
Strategic (Head Chef 🧠): Interesting — how does it fit into the broader ecosystem? Any sustainability or funding plans?
Accountability (Hostess with the Mostest: Great! What does the roadmap look like? Any key milestones coming up soon?
Technical (Nerd Cook 💻): Nice! What stack are you using? Is the code open source and the data FAIR?
Cooking Curious (Active contributor ❤️): Cool! How did you get involved? What are you working on right now?
Participant (Not sure where to get star: That's a nice project! Curious to know how you got involved

Direct Questions: You are part of an event organizing group, you are most likely to take one of the following roles
Communication (Influencer Cook 📢): Writing the event narrative, promotional copy, and keeping the social buzz alive
Engagement (Community Cook 🤝): Designing the programme to encourage participation and centre diverse voices
Strategic (Head Chef 🧠): Aligning the event with organisational goals and identifying partnership opportunities
Accountability (Hostess with the Mostest: Managing logistics, tracking the budget, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks
Technical (Nerd Cook 💻): Setting up the tech — platform, recording, accessibility tools, and shared notes
Cooking Curious (Active contributor ❤️): Volunteering to help with whatever needs doing, and encouraging others to do the same
Participant (Not sure where to get star: Purchase the ticket to attend and looking for ways to contribute

Direct Questions: You are doing a retrospective for a project, what do you most notice in your notes
Communication (Influencer Cook 📢): Whether key messages reached the right audiences — and what landed vs. what flopped
Engagement (Community Cook 🤝): How engaged the community felt, and whether everyone truly had a voice
Strategic (Head Chef 🧠): Whether the project moved the mission forward and what bold moves to make next time
Accountability (Hostess with the Mostest: Whether timelines, budgets, and action items were actually tracked and closed out
Technical (Nerd Cook 💻): Whether the code is reproducible, documented, and properly archived for others to build on
Cooking Curious (Active contributor ❤️): Whether people felt like they had a chance to contribute and whether they took it
Participant (Not sure where to get star: Retrospective? Huh! I wonder what happens in those meetings?

Direct Questions: Your nerdy colleagues come to your office and rant about something, what is your reaction?
Communication (Influencer Cook 📢): You listen, then suggest they channel it into a blog post or a rallying tweet thread
Engagement (Community Cook 🤝): You empathise deeply, then ask who else feels this way and how to bring them together
Strategic (Head Chef 🧠): You help them reframe the rant as an opportunity and identify the key stakeholders to involve
Accountability (Hostess with the Mostest: You pull out your notebook and start capturing their concerns as potential action items
Technical (Nerd Cook 💻): You're already mid-rant with them, tabs open, links flying, and a GitHub issue half-drafted
Cooking Curious (Active contributor ❤️): Check if they need help troubleshooting, finding collaborators, or sharing their work?
Participant (Not sure where to get star: You listen and commiserate, sharing your own frustrations with the problem

Direct Questions: You are interacting with multiple groups to solve a problem, where do you generally start?
Communication (Influencer Cook 📢): By crafting a shared message that resonates with every audience you need to reach
Engagement (Community Cook 🤝): By listening to each group first to understand how they relate to one another
Strategic (Head Chef 🧠): By identifying the key decision-makers and aligning everyone on shared goals
Accountability (Hostess with the Mostest: By clarifying roles, responsibilities, and who owns which part of the solution
Technical (Nerd Cook 💻): By mapping the technical dependencies and infrastructure constraints first
Cooking Curious (Active contributor ❤️): You ask how you can help and jump in wherever you can add value
Participant (Not sure where to get star: You listen, observe and look for an opening to contribute
